use_cases: User sign-in flow for web applications requiring authentication
Email-based account creation with social login option
Onboarding flow for SaaS platforms and membership sites
Secure access gate for developer tools and dashboards
ai_summary: A clean authentication modal component providing sign-in and registration functionality through Google OAuth and email input. Features a minimalist design with social login as the primary CTA, email input field with icon, and terms agreement link. Ideal for SaaS products and e-commerce platforms needing user authentication without redirecting to external pages.
